subject: Dec 14th, 2025
fact: The session takes place on Dec 14th, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Dec 14th, 2025

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim suggests the party rests in a cave with a single entrance.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggested they rest there

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim reminds the party that not everything in the Underdark is out to get them after eight uneventful hours.
source_quote: Bramgrim smugly reminded them that not everything in the Underdark was out to get them

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan is a filthy commoner who protectively stands over Drystan.
source_quote: a woman named Teegan protectively standing over a man named Drystan

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan sits rocking and clutching his knees.
source_quote: a man named Drystan, who sat rocking and clutching his knees

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan has dried blood pooled near him from wounds in his ears.
source_quote: dried blood pooled near Drystan from wounds in his ears

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Teegan initially accuses the party of working with their captor, Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Teegan initially accused the party of working with their captor, Maram il Vass

subject: Barlgura demons
fact: Two ugly Barlgura demons burst from behind the commoners.
source_quote: two ugly Barlgura demons burst from behind

subject: Barlgura demons
fact: The Barlgura demons howl about recapturing the pets.
source_quote: howling about recapturing "the pets"

subject: Spectral guardians
fact: Spectral guardians swirl around Bramgrim as he channels radiant energy.
source_quote: Spectral guardians swirled around Bramgrim as he channeled radiant energy

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas's arrows find their marks with deadly precision.
source_quote: Akritas's arrows found their marks with deadly precision

subject: Daein
fact: One demon attempts to torment Daein with horrifying psychic visions.
source_quote: one demon's attempt to torment Daein with horrifying psychic visions

subject: Barlgura demons
fact: The demons dissolve into dust and ochre upon defeat.
source_quote: watching as the demons dissolved into dust and ochre upon defeat

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan reveals she and Drystan were enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years.
source_quote: She and Drystan had been enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan confirms that a Drow had been brought to Maram's palace.
source_quote: Teegan confirmed that a Drow had indeed been brought to Maram's palace

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Teegan warns the party about Gabberforth, a deceptively polite deep gnome.
source_quote: She warned them about Gabberforth, a deceptively polite deep gnome

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth guarded the palace.
source_quote: who guarded the palace

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan drove a sharpened stick into both his ears to escape torment.
source_quote: he had driven a sharpened stick into both his ears to escape the torment

subject: Level up
fact: The party reaches 11th level.
source_quote: The party levels up to 11th level

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur decides to infuse his own armor for 17 AC.
source_quote: decides to infuse his own armor for 17 AC

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas gains a new ability called Volley.
source_quote: Akritas gains a new ability called Volley

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear's hit points are increased to reflect its new level.
source_quote: The Owlbear's hit points are increased to reflect its new level

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim gains the spell True Seeing.
source_quote: Bramgrim gains new spells, including Command, True Seeing

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim gains the spell Tongues.
source_quote: True Seeing (his only 6th-level spell), Tongues

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim gains the spell Banishment.
source_quote: Tongues, and Banishment

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The party arrives at the Den of the Whispered Word, a palace of black and red marble.
source_quote: The party arrives at the 'Den of the Whispered Word'

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The palace domes are lit by eerie blue, green, and purple fairy fire.
source_quote: its domes lit by eerie blue, green, and purple fairy fire

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: Ornate brass doors are carved with images of a half-elf's rise to power.
source_quote: At the ornate brass doors carved with images of a half-elf's rise to power

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth answers the door accompanied by a shield guardian.
source_quote: they were met by Gabberforth and his shield guardian

subject: shield guardian
fact: A shield guardian stands sentry at the door.
source_quote: A construct stands sentry at the door

subject: oil lamp
fact: An oil lamp flickers inside a smaller building.
source_quote: an oil lamp flickers inside a smaller building

subject: Daein
fact: Daein uses an Arcana check to understand how to approach such creatures.
source_quote: Daein uses an Arcana check to understand how to approach such creatures

subject: grand chamber
fact: The grand chamber has a polished white marble floor.
source_quote: a grand chamber with a polished white marble floor

subject: purple wooden desk
fact: A large purple wooden desk sits in the grand chamber.
source_quote: a large purple wooden desk

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: A rakishly handsome half-elf sits behind the desk.
source_quote: a rakishly handsome half-elf sat behind a desk

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Bramgrim casts True Seeing, shattering the illusion of the half-elf.
source_quote: The moment Bramgrim invoked his sight beyond sight, the illusion shattered

subject: Yugoloth
fact: The half-elf is revealed as a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth demon.
source_quote: The charming half-elf was revealed as a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass speaks casually of the endless blood war.
source_quote: Maram il Vass spoke casually of the endless blood war

subject: Felkur
fact: Maram identifies Felkur and his troubles with a group that believes he stole from them.
source_quote: identifying Felkur and the troubles with those who believed he had stolen from them

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Maram confirms he holds a prisoner named Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: Maram confirmed he held a prisoner named Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was acquired from fire giants.
source_quote: acquired from fire giants

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram offers to trade Xaven Tanor'this for Felkur.
source_quote: he would trade Xaven Tanor'this for Felkur himself

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Maram suggests trading Bramgrim instead of Felkur.
source_quote: he suggested Bramgrim instead

subject: Negotiation
fact: Maram demands ten thousand gold pieces or two rare magical items.
source_quote: Maram then revealed his true price: ten thousand gold pieces or two rare magical items

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items.
source_quote: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items

subject: Contract negotiation
fact: Maram presents a contract for the party's privacy agreement.
source_quote: Maram il Vass presents a contract for their privacy agreement

subject: side office
fact: Maram agrees to let the party use his side office.
source_quote: Maram reluctantly agreed to let them use his side office

subject: demons
fact: Two more demons emerge from the back room.
source_quote: two more demons emerged from the back room

subject: string
fact: The party sets up an alarm trap with string at the entrance.
source_quote: set up an improvised alarm trap with string and metal at the entrance

subject: metal item
fact: The party sets up an alarm trap with a metal item at the entrance.
source_quote: set up an improvised alarm trap with string and metal at the entrance

subject: cannon
fact: Felkur positions his cannon near the entrance.
source_quote: Felkur positions his cannon near the entrance

subject: sharpened stick
fact: Drystan shoved a pointed stick into both his ears.
source_quote: shove a pointed stick into both of his ears

subject: tapestries
fact: The entrance foyer features tapestries depicting the half-elf's rise to power.
source_quote: tapestries depicting the half-elf's rise to power

subject: vases
fact: The entrance foyer contains vases of exotic flowers.
source_quote: vases of exotic flowers

subject: glass containers
fact: The entrance foyer contains glass containers holding unusual creatures.
source_quote: glass containers holding unusual creatures

subject: incense
fact: The air inside the palace is filled with expensive incense.
source_quote: Inside, the palace was filled with expensive incense

subject: perfume
fact: The air inside the palace is filled with perfume.
source_quote: Inside, the palace was filled with expensive incense and perfume

subject: Felkur's problem
fact: A particular group believes Felkur stole something from them.
source_quote: those who believed he had stolen from them

subject: Drow prisoner
fact: The party is searching for a Drow prisoner held by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: When asked about the Drow

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: The party seeks to acquire Xaven Tanor'this from Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Maram confirmed he held a prisoner named Xaven Tanor'this
